falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant reduction in blowoff pressure would invalidate the current HOLD signal by indicating reduced urgency for a market reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: RSI(14) crosses above 70 on the S&P 500
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal overbought conditions contradicting the bearish pattern assumptions, proving the UNKNOWN verdict incorrect.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5,500 with sustained volume >2.5B shares
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout with confirmation volume would directly contradict the pattern's bearish implications and justify rejecting the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
